CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets the instruction set from the connected instrument.
Deletes the instruction set from the connected instrument.
Renews the lease with the connected instrument.
Drops the lease with the connected instrument.
Gets the Firmware version of the connected instrument.
Sets the new MAC address for the connected instrument.
Disconnects the specified client socket connection.
Resets the Ethernet module.
Requests beacon information from the connected instrument.
Requests the connected instrument for Admin privileges. NOTE: Application with admin privileges can execute any command on the instrument.
Gets the last response sent from the instrument.
Sets the status rate of the instrument to the specified interval.
Gets all the clients information connected to the instrument.
Sets the non-volatile memory value for the specified address.
Gets the non-volatile memory value for the specified address.
Gets Motor status (‘E’ for Error, ‘R’ for Running (or homing), ‘U’ for Unhomed, ‘P’ for Parked, ‘X’ Injection Valve not Installed), XYZ Position, Valve position (Load/Inject) and Error code.)
Sets the relay output contacts to either connected (1) or disconnected (0) or no change (X).
Sets the relay output contact 1 to either connected (1) or disconnected (0) or no change (X).
Sets the relay output contact 2 to either connected (1) or disconnected (0) or no change (X).
Legacy.
Clears the error code.
Gets the relay output contacts status power on/closed(1) or power off/open(0)
Gets status of relay and output contacts.
Gets error code. See user document for possible error codes.
Gets status of inputs contacts.
Gets XYZ & injector motors status.‘E’ for Error, ‘R’ for Running (or homing), ‘U’ for Unhomed, ‘P’ for Parked, ‘X’ Injection Valve not Installed
Gets status of output contacts.
Gets the Encoder position.Gets X, Y and Z in mm with a resolution of 0.1mm.
Gets the injector valve status. “R” = Running, motor in transition, “I” = Injection, Valve in Inject position, “L” = Load, Valve in Load position, “X” = Injection valve not present
Gets the position of X and Y axis. X and Y Value will be in mm with a resolution of 0.01mm.
Gets the position of Z axis in mm with a resolution of 0.01mm.
Homes the X, Y and Z axis. Moves Z to top of travel and X, Y to the park position. NOTE: Command will clear error states.
The PROM instrument name and version.
Legacy.
Gets the injection valve status. “R” = Running, motor in transition, “I” = Injection, Valve in Inject position, “L” = Load, Valve in Load position, “X” = Injection valve not present
Sets the new X-axis position. NOTE: This will not enable Liquid Level Detection.
Sets the new X-axis position enabling Liquid Level Detection.
Moves X-axis to a new position with the specified speed enabling Liquid Level Detection.
Moves X-axis to new position with the specified speed. NOTE: This will not enable Liquid Level Detection.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move X with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Moves to new X-axis position with the specified speed and drive level.
Set the new X-axis and Y-axis positions.
Move to new X-axis and Y-axis position with the specified speed.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move XY with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Moves to new X-axis and Y-axis positions with the specified speed and Drive level.
Moves to new Y-axis position.
Moves to new Y-axis position enabling Liquid Level Detection.
Moves to new Y-axis position with the specified speed enabling Liquid Level Detection.
Moves to new Y-axis position with the specified speed.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move Y with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Moves to new Y-axis position with the specified Speed and Drive level.
Moves to new Z-axis position.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Move Z with Speed and Current
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Moves to new Z position with the specified speed and drive level.
Moves to new Z-axis position with the specified speed.

Moves to new Z-axis position enabling Liquid Level Detection. If liquid is encountered (on a downward movement) or air is encountered (on an upward movement) the movement stops immediately. If the position is the same as the target specified it may be assumed that liquid (or air) was not encountered
Moves to new Z-position with the specified speed enabling Liquid Level Detection.
Get the status of the relay output contacts.
Gets the status of relay output contact 1.
Get the status of relay output contact 2.
Sets the specified relay output contact for pulse time specified. For example values 1 and 0.5 sets the relay contact 1 to be closed for 0.5 seconds.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: 1 implies contact relay 1 which is second from bottom, 2 implies contact relay 2 which is bottom one.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Wait for X-Motor to come to parked position.
Wait for X and Y Motors to come to parked position.
Wait for Y-Motor to come to parked position.
Wait for Z-Motor to come to parked position.
Flips valve to position specified and then aspirates specified volume with the specified flow rate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Flow rate in ml/min at which to aspirate

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Legacy.
Clears the error code.
Flips valve to position specified and then dispenses specified volume with the specified flow rate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: 'N' for Needle or 'R' for Reservoir position

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Gets error code. See user document for possible error codes.
Get the status of Valve motor and Syringe motor status. 'U' for unpowered, 'P' for parked, 'R' for running, 'E' for error.
Gets the Valve position of the syringe and the Volume of the syringe contents. Default unit for volume is µL.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Valve position can be 'R' for Reservoir, ‘N’ for Needle, ‘O’ for valve motor overload, ‘X’ for running

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Halt the syringe and generate error.
The PROM instrument name and version.
Legacy.
Moves valve to specified position or stops the syringe - 'L' for Load position, 'I' for Inject position, 'X' for stop syringe.
Wait for Syringe pump to finish.
